subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Truth! Though numerous letters from this servant are already in thy possession, yet again [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق هر چند مکاتیب متعدده این عبد نزد شما موجود ولى باز
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
